name: Espuma de Crema Catalana
instructions: Put all ingredients in a vacuum seal bag
Remove from sous-vide and move to ISI canister. Add 2 gas charges.
Hold ISI in warm water bath prior to spraying espuma
Siphon out espuma. Top with additional organic cane sugar. Torch to golden. Serve on top of ice cream, ganache, etc.
directions: Fill ISI siphon canister with one quart crema catalana and 2 gas charges
